title: Solar DeepResearch Professor-Grade Survey Pipeline
current_truth: Professor-grade DeepResearch survey now has final-quality gates, source/literature/chief-editor review, chapter rewrite queue items, and a professor-grade writing policy that emits section and chapter prompt packets. Runtime CLI smoke verified policy_id and new section template blocks.

history.note: Recovered missing id/sprint_id from status filename so scanner can route the sprint.

history.raw_extra: {"status_fields":{"phase":"planning_complete","handoff_to":"builder_main","target_role":"builder_main"},"note":"Approved legacy state normalized to DAG dispatch."}}
{"status_fields":{"phase":"prd_ready","handoff_to":"planner","target_role":"planner"},"note":"Single-builder fallback disabled; planner DAG is required."}}

history.note: Added Chinese section headers (变更文件列表 / Done 条件达成证据 / 验证方法) to satisfy schemas/validate.sh handoff gate. Validator now PASS.
Added writing_loop.py, survey-run-sections CLI, revision_trace artifacts, and runtime/source regressions: 68 passed on both paths.
Added SurveyWriterBackend, deterministic backend, prompt packet artifacts, chapter editorial_review.json, and runtime/source regressions: 70 passed on both paths.
Added human-packet and human-packet-fallback backends. Runtime/source regressions: 74 passed. CLI smoke verified WAITING_FOR_HUMAN then response consumption PASS.
Added local-command backend. Runtime/source regressions: 78 passed. CLI smoke verified stdin prompt packet -> stdout Markdown -> PASS.
Added pane-packet backend. Runtime/source regressions: 82 passed. CLI smoke verified pane_dispatch artifact and WAITING_FOR_PANE state without default send-keys.
Added survey-watch-responses artifact watcher. Runtime/source regressions: 85 passed. CLI smoke verified pending_responses and response finalization without pane screen parsing.

Added research.survey.watch_automation package, survey-watch-register/tick CLI, and runtime-soak integration. Runtime/source regressions: 90 passed. CLI smoke verified pending_total=32 without fake completion.

Added strict evaluator coverage gates for source types, evidence count, claim count, evidence-source coverage, claim-evidence support, and ready pack ratio. Runtime/source regressions: 92 passed. CLI smoke verified plan-only survey fails with coverage issues.

history.reason: task_graph gate survey-schemas-pass was passed but node/node_results still reviewing, blocking parent-ready evaluator dispatch

history.note: All 7 DAG nodes PASS; 94 tests pass; strict survey-eval correctly rejects plan-only; package-first boundary honored; main CLI compat preserved. D1-D7 + Non-Negotiables + Stop Rules satisfied.

Added research.survey.quality module, survey_taxonomy.json, survey_contradiction_matrix.json, and strict evaluator gates for taxonomy_depth_score and contradiction_coverage. Runtime/source regressions: 94 passed.
Added section-level factual audit for finalized survey sections. Final text claim/evidence tags must exist in the section evidence_pack. Runtime/source regressions: 96 passed.
Added lexical claim-to-evidence grounding gate. Evidence ids must be cited in context overlapping the evidence span/content. Runtime/source regressions: 97 passed.
Added section reviewer scorecard with ranked P0/P1/P2 issues and rewrite recommendations. Runtime/source regressions: 98 passed.
Added survey-rewrite-queue CLI and rewrite queue artifact from section scorecard. Runtime/source regressions: 102 passed.
Added survey-rewrite-run CLI to consume survey_rewrite_queue.json and execute section rewrites. Runtime/source regressions: 105 passed.
Added survey-auto-repair CLI: strict eval -> rewrite queue -> rewrite run -> re-eval. Runtime/source regressions: 109 passed.
Added survey-finalize-run CLI: plan -> pack -> write -> eval -> auto-repair -> compile -> final eval. Runtime/source regressions: 113 passed.
Added survey source-gap gate and handoff: finalize-run stops on weak ledgers and writes survey_source_gap_handoff.md. Runtime/source regressions: 116 passed.
Added survey-import-search-results: returned Markdown -> survey ledgers -> optional continue-finalize. Runtime/source regressions: 121 passed.

history.reason: graph_scheduler.node_status now treats passed gate as durable node closeout unless failed

events.summary: Added survey-status-next-action to compute not_started, need_search_results, need_import_results, ready_to_finalize, waiting_for_writer, and done states.
Added survey-continue to execute safe local next actions until done or real source/writer pause.
Added final-quality gate and require-complete continuation path so incomplete/tiny survey reports cannot pass as professor-grade output.
Added source-authority coverage gate and survey_source_coverage.json so professor-grade surveys must cover paper, official_doc, code, and benchmark evidence before passing.
verification: runtime weak-source smoke stopped at need_search_results
source canonical-source smoke passed source_count=16 authority_avg=0.8594

events.summary: Added survey_literature_map.json, survey_controversy_matrix.json, and survey_chapter_review.json with strict evaluator consumption.
verification: runtime CLI smoke require-complete status=done literature_ok=true controversy_ok=true chapter_review_ok=true

events.summary: Added survey_chief_editor.json and connected chapter_review issues into survey-rewrite-queue with section de-duplication.
verification: runtime CLI smoke require-complete chief_ok=true complete_context=true

events.summary: Added professor-grade writing policy metadata, source-type guidance, chapter context, chapter prompt packets, and stronger section template checks.
